overall.description: Gameplay footage from GTA V showing a nighttime drive through Los Santos. The player follows a silver sedan through urban streets, turns onto the Del Perro Pier, and drives along the wooden boardwalk past amusement park attractions. The scene features neon lighting, palm trees, and transitions from asphalt city roads to wooden pier planks.

segments.scene_description: Driving through a well-lit urban commercial district at night, following a silver sedan along a multi-lane asphalt road. An orange sports car overtakes on the left while commercial buildings and palm trees line the street. Street lights provide artificial illumination of the scene.

segments.scene_description: Approaching a major intersection dominated by a large purple neon archway marking the Del Perro Pier entrance. The vehicle makes a right turn onto the pier approach, passing under the glowing sign. The silver sedan continues ahead in the distance while the urban buildings recede into the background.

segments.scene_description: Driving over the water on a bridge with metal railings, transitioning onto the wooden planks of the Del Perro Pier. The amusement park comes into view ahead with a large ferris wheel and colorful lights. The city skyline remains visible in the background across the water.

segments.scene_description: Driving through the open wooden parking area of the amusement pier, navigating between parked vehicles. The roller coaster and ferris wheel dominate the left side while various pier buildings line the right. The city skyline glows in the distance across the water, and a few pedestrians walk along the edges of the pier.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a brightly lit urban commercial district into the neon-soaked atmosphere of the Del Perro Pier. It begins by following a silver sedan along a multi-lane asphalt road lined with palm trees, as an orange sports car briefly overtakes on the left under the glow of street lights. As the vehicle approaches a major intersection, the scene shifts toward a large purple neon archway, passing under the glowing sign as the city buildings begin to recede. The camera then transitions from the road onto a bridge with metal railings and eventually over the wooden planks of the pier, where the city skyline remains visible in the distance while a colorful ferris wheel emerges ahead. Finally, the movement expands into an open wooden parking area, navigating between parked cars and pedestrians as the roller coaster and amusement park structures dominate the landscape.
